ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process the case belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case was last updated */,
  "case_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "case_category" TEXT /* Category of the case (e.g., sales, marketing, HR) */,
  "case_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the activity occurring */,
  "init_time" TEXT /* Initialization time of the activity */,
  "sys_time" TEXT /* System time when the activity was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity type */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "activity_assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user or team assigned to the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("activity_assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("activity_assigned_to") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was last updated */,
  "process_owner" INTEGER /* ID of the user or team responsible for the process */,
  "process_category" TEXT /* Category of the process (e.g., sales, marketing, HR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the comment is made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity being assigned */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user or team being assigned to */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., user, team) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_assignments_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_assignments_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_assignments_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case at the time of change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_versions_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)
